ddls:
CREATE TABLE "feature_types" (
  "feature_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature type */,
  "feature_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature type (e.g., unigram, bigram, n-gram) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature type */,
  "max_n" INTEGER /* Maximum n-gram length for n-gram feature types */,
  "min_n" INTEGER /* Minimum n-gram length for n-gram feature types */,
  "is_pretrained" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feature type uses pretrained models or embeddings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representation_methods" (
  "representation_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representation method */,
  "representation_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the representation method (e.g., frequency, presence) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the representation method */,
  "is_normalized" INTEGER /* Indicates if the representation method normalizes the feature values */,
  "is_binary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the representation method uses binary values (0 or 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representation_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., NB, ME, SVM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "is_pretrained" INTEGER /* Indicates if the model is pretrained */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON string containing hyperparameters for the model */,
  "training_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last training run */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "feature_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature type used */,
  "representation_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representation method used */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used */,
  "accuracy_nb" REAL /* Accuracy score for Naive Bayes model */,
  "accuracy_me" REAL /* Accuracy score for Maximum Entropy model */,
  "accuracy_ngram" REAL /* Accuracy score for N-Gram model */,
  "accuracy_svm" REAL /* Accuracy score for SVM model */,
  "precision_nb" REAL /* Precision score for Naive Bayes model */,
  "precision_me" REAL /* Precision score for Maximum Entropy model */,
  "precision_ngram" REAL /* Precision score for N-Gram model */,
  "precision_svm" REAL /* Precision score for SVM model */,
  "recall_nb" REAL /* Recall score for Naive Bayes model */,
  "recall_me" REAL /* Recall score for Maximum Entropy model */,
  "recall_ngram" REAL /* Recall score for N-Gram model */,
  "recall_svm" REAL /* Recall score for SVM model */,
  "f1_score_nb" REAL /* F1-score for Naive Bayes model */,
  "f1_score_me" REAL /* F1-score for Maximum Entropy model */,
  "f1_score_ngram" REAL /* F1-score for N-Gram model */,
  "f1_score_svm" REAL /* F1-score for SVM model */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the performance metric run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_feature_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_type_id") REFERENCES feature_types ("feature_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_representation_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("representation_method_id") REFERENCES representation_methods ("representation_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text data entry */,
  "text" TEXT /* The text content */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the text data (e.g., customer review, social media post) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category or label of the text data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the text data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the text data */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* JSON string containing additional metadata about the text data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_sets" (
  "feature_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature set */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text data entry */,
  "feature_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature type used */,
  "representation_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representation method used */,
  "features" TEXT /* Extracted features as a string or array */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feature set was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feature set */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* JSON string containing additional metadata about the feature set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_sets_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES text_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_sets_representation_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("representation_method_id") REFERENCES representation_methods ("representation_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_sets_feature_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_type_id") REFERENCES feature_types ("feature_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classification_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text data entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for classification */,
  "predicted_category" TEXT /* Predicted category or label */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the classification result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the classification result */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* JSON string containing additional metadata about the classification result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classification_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classification_results_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES text_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, NLP researcher, product manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing user permissions */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
